---
applyTo: "app/**/*.tsx,components/**/*.tsx,**/*.module.css"
---

# Frontend instructions

- Use TypeScript, React, and CSS Modules.
- Keep presentational UI separate from data fetching and transformation logic.
- Use semantic HTML and accessible interactions.
- Avoid `"use client"` unless interactivity, browser APIs, or client-side state require it.
- Do not import Prisma or server-only modules into client code.
- Do not expose secrets or server-only environment variables to the browser.
- Keep CSS Module changes scoped and minimal.
